expectations.text: Correctly identifies takeUntilDestroyed as unnecessary on HTTP calls (HTTP observables auto-complete)
expectations.evidence: response.md: "HttpClient.get() est un observable fini — il complete automatiquement... Ajouter takeUntilDestroyed est du bruit inutile"

expectations.text: Recommends moving HttpClient call to a service
expectations.evidence: corrected.ts: Creates `UserService` with `@Injectable({ providedIn: 'root' })` and moves `http.get` there

expectations.text: Suggests toSignal() or resource() as a better pattern
Does NOT validate the original code as correct
